description: Every Hotelist feature, plus a local SQLite mirror that ranks rating-per-dollar across whole countries, compares chains head-to-head, and tracks how a city's hotels change over time.

novel_features.name: Country value leaderboard
novel_features.description: Rank the best hotels across an entire country by Hotelist rating-per-dollar, with compound amenity and price filters.

novel_features.name: Chain vs chain value showdown
novel_features.description: Compare hotel chains head-to-head on mean rating, median price, and rating-per-dollar in a country.

novel_features.name: Nomad corridor scout
novel_features.description: Find the best hotel in each stop of a multi-city route in one pass, with shared filters.

novel_features.name: Watch & drift tracker
novel_features.description: Snapshot a saved location over time and diff which hotels improved, declined, or changed price since you last checked.

novel_features.name: Chain consistency score
novel_features.description: Compute mean, median, and spread of a single chain's ratings across a country to see if the brand is reliably good or full of outliers.

novel_features.name: Price cliff finder
novel_features.description: Find the price point in a city where rating-per-extra-dollar collapses — the cheapest hotel that's still legitimately good.
